get_thies_data.name: Get THIES Data
get_thies_data.description: Reads the configured THIES credentials and returns the sync and backup status.

post_thies_data.name: Post THIES Data
post_thies_data.description: Executes THIES backup and synchronization using the configured credentials.

export_files.name: Export Files
export_files.description: Synchronizes a local folder under the configured backup root with SharePoint.
